tests.name: test_aspect_shift_up
tests.description: Verify SHIFT_ASPECT action increases aspect value by delta

tests.name: test_aspect_shift_down
tests.description: Verify SHIFT_ASPECT action decreases aspect value by delta

tests.name: test_aspect_clamping_max
tests.description: Verify aspect values are clamped at +3

tests.name: test_aspect_clamping_min
tests.description: Verify aspect values are clamped at -3

tests.name: test_game_over_two_extremes
tests.description: Verify game over when 2 aspects reach extreme values

tests.name: test_souffle_cost_deduction
tests.description: Verify souffle is deducted when choosing card option with cost

tests.name: test_souffle_risk_mode
tests.description: Verify Risk Mode activates when souffle reaches 0

tests.name: test_fallback_card_generation
tests.description: Verify fallback pool generates valid TRIADE cards
tests.assertion: assert_not_null(card) and assert_has(card, 'text') and assert_has(card, 'options') and assert_eq(card.options.size(), 3)

tests.name: test_card_option_structure
tests.description: Verify each option has required fields (label, effects)
tests.action: for option in card.options: check structure

tests.name: test_fallback_pool_exhaustion
tests.description: Verify system handles fallback pool exhaustion gracefully

tests.name: test_execute_shift_aspect
tests.description: Verify SHIFT_ASPECT effect is executed correctly
tests.setup: Create MerlinStore, create effect {type: SHIFT_ASPECT, aspect: corps, delta: 1}

tests.name: test_execute_souffle_cost
tests.description: Verify SOUFFLE effect deducts cost
tests.setup: Create MerlinStore, create effect {type: SOUFFLE, cost: 2}

tests.name: test_execute_karma
tests.description: Verify KARMA effect updates karma value
tests.setup: Create MerlinStore, create effect {type: KARMA, delta: 3}

tests.name: test_all_aspects_extreme
tests.description: EDGE-001: All 3 aspects at extreme
tests.setup: Create MerlinStore, set corps=3, ame=-3, monde=3

tests.name: test_souffle_zero_risk_mode
tests.description: EDGE-002: Souffle at 0 activates Risk Mode

tests.name: test_empty_queue_llm_timeout
tests.description: EDGE-003: Empty card queue + LLM timeout
tests.setup: Empty card queue, mock LLM timeout

tests.name: test_llm_to_ui_flow
tests.description: Verify full pipeline: LLM generation → validation → UI display
tests.action: generate card, validate, send to UI
tests.assertion: UI displays 3 options with correct labels and effects

tests.name: test_json_repair_strategies
tests.description: Verify 4 JSON repair strategies handle malformed LLM output
tests.setup: Mock LLM with malformed JSON (missing quotes, trailing commas, etc.)

tests.name: test_rag_context_assembly
tests.description: Verify RAG context stays within 180 token budget
tests.setup: Create context with biome, aspects, recent cards

tests.name: test_save_mid_run
tests.description: Verify save captures all run state (aspects, souffle, karma, bond, biome)
tests.setup: Create MerlinStore with non-default state (corps=2, souffle=3, etc.)

tests.name: test_load_from_slot
tests.description: Verify load restores all state correctly
tests.setup: Save a known state to slot 1

tests.name: test_slot_corruption_handling
tests.description: EDGE-010: Verify graceful handling of corrupted save file
tests.setup: Write malformed JSON to slot file

tests.name: test_scene_flow_canonical_order
tests.description: Verify canonical scene flow: IntroCeltOS → MenuPrincipal → ... → MerlinGame
tests.action: Simulate user interactions through full flow

tests.name: test_fall_ending_trigger
tests.description: EDGE-007: Verify one fall ending is reachable
tests.setup: Script a playthrough forcing corps=3, ame=-3

tests.name: test_victory_ending_trigger
tests.description: EDGE-007: Verify one victory ending is reachable
tests.setup: Script a playthrough with balanced aspects and high karma

tests.name: test_card_generation_latency
tests.description: Verify LLM card generation completes in < 3s
tests.action: measure time from request to response

tests.name: test_json_parse_success_rate
tests.description: Verify JSON parse success rate > 60% over 100 samples
tests.setup: Generate 100 LLM responses with known success rate

immediate: Write test_edge_cases.gd with 3 critical edge cases (3 hours)
long_term: Implement Triade state coverage campaign (343 combinations) (20+ hours)
